title: ASTU Re-evaluation Results 2026 - Key Highlights

detail.title: ASTU Re-evaluation Results 2026 - Key Highlights
detail.short_info: ASTU Re-evaluation Result 2026 : Assam Science and Technology University Result 2026 has been released on astu.ac.in. Here is the direct Link to check your B.Tech (8th End-Semester) Results Online.

content.text: Assam Science and Technology University (ASTU) has officially declared the B.Tech 8th End-Semester Re-evaluation Results 2026 on 12.03.2026. The results belong to the 2025 academic session, and students can check their status online at the ASTU exam portal.

These results are essential for progression to the next semester and verification of academic performance. Students can access their result by visiting the official ASTU website at astu.ac.in and entering their registration credentials. It is advised to download and save the result PDF for future academic and official reference.

Assam Science and Technology University (ASTU) has published the latest B.Tech 8th End-Semester results on its official website for the 2025 academic session. Students can log in using their registration credentials and download the provisional results for academic reference and record-keeping.

The university has activated the direct link for checking B.Tech 8th End-Semester results. Students can instantly view or download their result sheet through the official portal using the link provided below.

sections.heading: How to Check ASTU Re-evaluation Results 2026 Online?

content.text: ASTU has made the result download process simple and quick for students. Candidates only need their registration number and date of birth to view results on the official portal. Here is a step-by-step process you can follow:

items: Visit the Official Website - Go to the official ASTU exam portal at astu.ac.in.
Find the Results Section - Click on the Examination or Results tab on the homepage.
Select Your Exam - Choose B.Tech 8th End-Semester Re-evaluation Results from the list of available results.
Enter Your Details - Input your Registration Number and Date of Birth in the required fields.
Submit & View - Click the Submit button to view your ASTU result 2026 on screen.
Download the Mark Sheet - Click Download or Print to save your result PDF for official use.
Verify Your Details - Check that your name, roll number, and marks are correctly reflected on the mark sheet.
